Bash(node -e "let b='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>b+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(b\);const fe=\(j.products||[]\).filter\(p=>p.productType==='FRONTEND'\);console.log\('FE SKUs em produção:'\);fe.forEach\(p=>{const direct=p.estimatedMarginPct;const att=p.attributedMarginPct;const sess=p.attributedSessions;const flag=sess>=3?'✓atrib':'sem dados';console.log\(\\`  \\${p.name.padEnd\(40\)} | direta=\\${direct.toFixed\(1\)}% | atrib=\\${att.toFixed\(1\)}% \(\\${sess}s/\\${p.attributedOrders}o\) [\\${flag}]\\`\)}\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "let b='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>b+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(b\);const fe0=\(j.orders||[]\).filter\(o=>o.productType==='FRONTEND'&&o.cpaPaidUsd===0\);console.log\('FE com cpa=0:', fe0.length\);fe0.slice\(0,8\).forEach\(o=>console.log\(\\`  \\${o.externalId} gross=\\$\\${o.grossAmountUsd} net=\\$\\${o.netAmountUsd} aff=\\${o.affiliateExternalId}|\\${o.affiliateNickname}\\`\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "let b='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>b+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(b\);console.log\('total:',j.total\);const byDayBRT={};j.orders.forEach\(o=>{const utc=new Date\(o.orderedAt\);const brtMs=utc.getTime\(\)-3*3600*1000;const brtDay=new Date\(brtMs\).toISOString\(\).slice\(0,10\);byDayBRT[brtDay]=\(byDayBRT[brtDay]||0\)+1;}\);Object.entries\(byDayBRT\).sort\(\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\('  BRT '+k+': '+v+' orders'\)\);console.log\('---first 3 most recent \(orderedAt UTC\)---'\);j.orders.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(o=>console.log\('  '+o.orderedAt+' '+o.platformSlug+' '+o.externalId\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "let b='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>b+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(b\);const sum=\(arr,k\)=>arr.reduce\(\(s,o\)=>s+\(o[k]||0\),0\);const approved=\(j.orders||[]\).filter\(o=>o.status==='APPROVED'\);console.log\('approved count:',approved.length,'  gross sum: \\$'+sum\(approved,'grossAmountUsd'\).toFixed\(2\),'  net: \\$'+sum\(approved,'netAmountUsd'\).toFixed\(2\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const targets=['neuromindpro2','neuromindpro3','neuromindpro6','neuromindpro4','neuromindpro8','nightcalm3','nightcalm6','flexguard1','immuneguard1','flexguard3','immuneguard3'];console.log\('Total BG products:',r.products.length\);console.log\('\\\\nMatches found:'\);const matched=[];targets.forEach\(t=>{const p=r.products.find\(p=>p.externalId===t\);if\(p\){matched.push\(p\);console.log\('  ✓',t,'→',p.name,'\(family:',p.family+',',p.orderCount,'orders, current override:',p.override,'\)'\)}else{console.log\('  ✗',t,'NOT FOUND in DB'\)}}\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\);const byFam=new Map\(\);const byPlat=new Map\(\);r.products.forEach\(p=>{const k=\(p.family||'no-family'\)+'|'+p.effectiveSupplier;byFam.set\(k,\(byFam.get\(k\)||0\)+p.orderCount\);const pk=p.platformSlug+'|'+p.effectiveSupplier;byPlat.set\(pk,\(byPlat.get\(pk\)||0\)+p.orderCount\)}\);console.log\('\\\\nPor família × supplier \(LIFETIME\):'\);[...byFam.entries\(\)].sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{const[f,s]=k.split\('|'\);console.log\('  ',f.padEnd\(28\),s.padEnd\(12\),v.toLocaleString\(\)\)}\);console.log\('\\\\nPor plataforma × supplier \(LIFETIME\):'\);[...byPlat.entries\(\)].sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{const[p,s]=k.split\('|'\);console.log\('  ',p.padEnd\(15\),s.padEnd\(12\),v.toLocaleString\(\)\)}\)}\)")
